Class Triangle

java.lang.Object
model.Triangle
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Triangle extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a triangle between three medical sites.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Triangle

      public Triangle(MedicalSite siteA, MedicalSite siteB, MedicalSite siteC)

  • Method Details

    • computeSurface

      public double computeSurface()

    • getCircumcenter

      public Position getCircumcenter()
      Computes the circumcenter of the triangle. The circumcenter is used in the Delaunay condition.

    • getCircumradius

      public double getCircumradius()

    • containsInCircumcircle

      public boolean containsInCircumcircle(MedicalSite site)
      Checks if a medical site is inside the circumcircle of this triangle. In a Delaunay triangulation, no other point should be inside the circumcircle.

    • containsSite

      public boolean containsSite(MedicalSite site)

    • getDistanceAB

      public double getDistanceAB()

    • getDistanceBC

      public double getDistanceBC()
